description: A well-specified plan with measurable goal, concrete verification command, and explicit file scope.

plan.task: Add retry logic to src/core/worker_runner.js: retry up to 3 times on transient spawn errors, with 500ms backoff, and expose retryCount in the worker result object.
plan.context: Worker spawns sometimes fail transiently in CI due to process limits. Retries with backoff reduce false-negatives. Success criterion: worker_runner.test.js retry cases pass and retryCount field is present in result.
